title: No Amount of Shooing Can Keep Earthly Vices at Bay
overview: Taishakuten and Bonten are here to deliver the Earth from evil! But evil takes time to show up, and these two deities need a crash course on the conveniences of modern life.

title: No Treasure Is Worth More than Friendship
overview: Karuraten is tired of Taishakuten and Bonten's constant bickering, but if he wants to stay in the material world, he'll need help to get the two to behave.

title: Behold the Flower that Blooms in the Shadow of the Obvious
overview: Kannon and Seishi are brothers but misunderstandings threaten to drive them apart. Meanwhile, Miroku seeks to prove he's not a kid and finds new friends among senior citizens.

title: You Can’t Fulfill Wishes Without Both Feet on the Ground
overview: The situation's changed. An ambush by powerful vices means the Thirteen Buddhas must consolidate their strength... but Dainichi hasn't returned from his vacation yet.

title: One Lie Leads to a Hundred Lies
overview: Dainichi's overwhelming power is the solution to their escalating situation. However, he's unwilling to return to duty. Why?

title: If You Are to Forgive Sin Behold the Face of the Sinner
overview: As the Buddhas split into teams to deal with the increasing threat, Taishakuten and Bonten attempt to lift Shaka’s spirits.

title: You Cannot Return to the Past But You Can Carry on With the Future
overview: Despite Taishakuten’s pleas, the flames of Ashura’s wrath refuse to quell. They were once friends, but that is no longer true. What happened in the distant past?

title: Out of Sight is Different From Gone
overview: As Taishakuten recovers from his wounds, an enraged Fudo vows to hunt Ashura down. When Fudo goes AWOL, Amida and Bonten must locate him.

title: Set the Unenlightened Night Aglow With Smiles
overview: Mara’s decisive strike against the shrine yields devastating results. With the halo fragments stolen and Shaka Nyorai captured, the Buddhas’ only hope is a cryptic message.

title: The Fruit Of Doubt Bears No Seed
overview: As Taiskakuten fends off Ashura’s assault, Boten attempts to free Shaka Nyorai. The others rally to save Shinjuku, but how can hope remain when even gods can succumb to vices?

title: There Can Be No Enlightenment Without Vice
overview: Mara loses composure as the tide of battle swings in the Buddhas’ favor, but nothing is more dangerous than a cornered foe. What will this mean for Shaka Nyorai and Ashura?

title: Be at Peace with Vice-Prone Souls
overview: The deities have earned a break after their fierce battle against Mara. Ashura tries to integrate with the team, but can he successfully do so after all that’s happened?
